violations.description: Avoid ambiguity between help topics and commands
violations.change_description: Created ambiguity between list command and help topic

violations.rule_title: Error messages must be consistent in tone and formatting
violations.description: All error outputs should follow same pattern (lowercase, no punctuation or consistent punctuation)

violations.rule_title: Action commands must align with their effect (close, reopen, reject)
violations.description: Commands that change todo state must use verbs that clearly indicate the action
